scripts.validate: npm run validate:scenarios && npm run validate:dependencies
scripts.validate:scenarios: for scenario in scenarios/*.yaml; do cargo run -q -p cockpit-simulator -- validate "$scenario" || exit 1; done
scripts.calibrate: python3 calibration/calibrate.py && python3 calibration/calibrate_vehicle_fire.py && python3 calibration/validate_human_heat_stress.py && python3 calibration/verify.py
scripts.simulator:run-live:acp: cargo run -p cockpit-simulator --features live-acp -- run-live scenarios/smoke-in-cockpit.yaml --ticks 80
scripts.eval:suite: cargo build -p cockpit-simulator -p cockpit-evaluator && ./target/debug/cockpit-evaluator --suite evaluations/suite.yaml --simulator-command ./target/debug/cockpit-simulator --json-report target/evaluation-report.json --junit-report target/evaluation-junit.xml
scripts.eval:suite:release: cargo build --release -p cockpit-simulator -p cockpit-evaluator && ./target/release/cockpit-evaluator --suite evaluations/suite.yaml --simulator-command ./target/release/cockpit-simulator --json-report target/evaluation-report.json --junit-report target/evaluation-junit.xml
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run validate
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run build
scripts.clean: cargo clean && rm -rf apps/cockpit-desktop/dist apps/cockpit-desktop/node_modules apps/cockpit-desktop/src-tauri/target apps/cockpit-desktop/src-tauri/binaries
